title: Triple Combination! Swordbot: Samurai!
overview: The Predacons awaken and begin their search for the Legendiscs. In the midst of a Predacon attack, Isami summons the Swordbot Samurai Team.

title: Triple Combination! Swordbot: Ninja!
overview: In the midst of a Predacon attack upon Nagoya Castle, Tobio summons the Swordbot Shinobi Team.

title: Pursue! The Legendiscs!
overview: The Predacons go back in time to acquire an artifact, and the Samurai Team and Isami pursue them.

title: The Invincible Swordsman - Ryoma Sakamoto!?
overview: Chasing another Legendisc in the past, Isami and the Samurai Team encounter legendary swordman Ryoma Sakamoto.

title: Discover! The Legendiscs!
overview: Tobio and the Shinobi team go back in time and meet Tobio's ancestor, the Fuma clan leader Kotaro Fuma.

title: Showdown! Benkei Musashibo!
overview: Isami and the Samurai Team, and the Predacons, pursue another Legendisc to the past. There they find it in the hands of the great warrior Benkei Musashibo.

title: Depart! Optimus Exprime!
overview: The secrets of the Legendiscs are finally revealed to Isami and the Samurai Team, but they find themselves attacked by the revived Dragotron.

title: Enter! The New Warrior!
overview: Tobio and the Shinobi Team finally retrieve the yellow Legendisc from Sasuke Sarutobi. Unfortunately, the revived Dragotron has other plans for the disc.

title: Final Battle! Link-Up Triple Combination DaiGekisou!
overview: Dragotron kidnaps Tobio and puts his master plan into action; can the combined might of the Shinobi and Samurai Teams stand up him?

title: Final Battle! Link-Up Triple Combination DaiKenzan!
overview: Dragotron kidnaps Isami and puts his master plan into action; can the combined might of the Shinobi and Samurai Teams stand up him?
